design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Bullet Hell through its core shooter loop.

gdd_outline.combat_notes: Combat pacing should match genre tempo and readable threat language.
constraints: Signature mechanics must reinforce genre fantasy
gdd_outline.core_loop: Navigate dense bullet patterns, damage bosses and waves with focused fire, collect power-ups, and survive stage gauntlets with limited lives or continues.
gdd_outline.economy_notes: Tune earn/spend to genre tension targets.
gdd_outline.overview: Bullet hell shooters flood the screen with patterned projectiles while players weave through tight gaps. Mastery depends on memorizing enemy volleys and optimizing shot placement.
gdd_outline.progression_notes: Follow signature mechanic dependencies across early, mid, and late phases.

mechanics.expression: Enemies emit readable but dense bullet curtains.
mechanics.map_notes: Enemies emit readable but dense bullet curtains.

mechanics.expression: Wind-ups and pattern cycles create learnable dodge windows.
mechanics.map_notes: Wind-ups and pattern cycles create learnable dodge windows.

mechanics.expression: Responsive player shots reward positioning without charge delay.
mechanics.map_notes: Responsive player shots reward positioning without charge delay.

mechanics.expression: Limited lives or continues cap run length and raise stakes.
mechanics.map_notes: Limited lives or continues cap run length and raise stakes.

mechanics.expression: Boss spell cards or phases test accumulated pattern knowledge.
mechanics.map_notes: Boss spell cards or phases test accumulated pattern knowledge.

mechanics.expression: Shot power tiers reward survival without dying.
mechanics.map_notes: Shot power tiers reward survival without dying.

narrative.core_loop: Navigate dense bullet patterns, damage bosses and waves with focused fire, collect power-ups, and survive stage gauntlets with limited lives or continues.
narrative.description: Bullet hell shooters flood the screen with patterned projectiles while players weave through tight gaps. Mastery depends on memorizing enemy volleys and optimizing shot placement.

pacing.early: Teach projectile pattern enemy design with low failure cost.
pacing.late: Test full signature loop mastery under peak constraints.
pacing.mid: Combine supporting mechanics and raise resource or pattern pressure.

variants.label: Hardcore Bullet Hell
variants.notes: Tighter economy and higher failure cost for experienced players.
